title: Simply Zucchini Soup
instructions: In a medium size saucepan, melt butter.
Add zucchini and onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until transparent and liquid is absorbed.
Puree zucchini and onions in a blender or food processor until smooth.
Return to pan and add chicken broth, evaporated milk and pepper.
Taste and add salt as needed.
Sprinkle with freshly ground nutmeg when served if desired and top each bowl with 1 tablespoon of freshly grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
